7d389fc225.translation: Every Sunday the church service takes place in the church.

7d38e8c5a3.translation: Biologist Boisseau spotted a school of white-snouted dolphins from the crow's nest with binoculars, which are approaching and riding in the bow wave of the sailboat.

7d38fe8162.translation: Emil, Paul and Alfred were there too.

7d3ba3e5c4.text: Die türkische Belagerung Wiens im Jahre 1683 scheiterte trotz zahlenmäßiger Überlegenheit, womit der Niedergang Osmanischen Reiches für ganz Europa deutlich wurde.
7d3ba3e5c4.translation: The Turkish siege of Vienna in 1683 failed despite numerical superiority, which made the decline of the Ottoman Empire clear to all of Europe.

7d3ea519a1.translation: Most riders had already exercised their horses long ago.

7d3ff0e508.translation: It seemed as if he still hadn't expected the end of his exile.

7d40690825.translation: "The opaque developments on the Levantine coast have caused unease among ancient historians, archaeologists, and art historians."

7d4196824f.translation: This software automatically cleans the hard drive and even corrects or deletes faulty and unnecessary entries in the Windows registry.

7d41a67535.translation: "In the vast courtyard of the Rostov house, there lay here and there remnants of hay and dung from the horses of the wagon train."

7d42e214a1.translation: These are artificially produced materials that steer the incoming electromagnetic radiation around the object in a special way, so that it disappears for the corresponding wavelength range.

7d432b501d.translation: Exactly like Sung's store, these shops were family businesses and archives of goods, places for chatting, parcel drop-off points, last hope in the evening for baking powder, valves, light bulbs, and greeting cards.

7d43cfdcef.translation: It wasn't even that long ago that people would easily end up in prison for such blasphemy.

7d5108f415.translation: Mr. Federal President, Mrs. President of the Bundestag, Mr. President of the Federal Council, Mr. Chancellor, Israel fondly remembers your visits to us and the attitude you have shown towards the horrors of the past as well as the hopes of the future. 7d51f1edb6.translation: It emerges from various briefings by high officials of the administration that methods such as sleep deprivation and simulated drowning are no longer permitted.

7d57b69581.text: „Möglicherweise haben die Seleniten längst die Fahne auf ihren Polen aufgepflanzt, während die irdischen Polfahrten der Franklin, Ross, Kane, Dumont d'Urville und Lambert allesamt kläglich scheiterten.“
7d57b69581.translation: It is possible that the Selenites long ago planted their flag at their poles, while the terrestrial polar expeditions of Franklin, Ross, Kane, Dumont d'Urville and Lambert all miserably failed.

7d57ec2c97.translation: The International Monetary Fund warns of a new global economic crisis. Because the economy is performing worse than previously assumed, the organization lowered its outlook further.

7da47a4121.translation: 'The time for talking is over. Now it is time for action.'

7da52202da.translation: Their story now unfolds through individual episodes, each crafted with as much love as the violin itself, whose emotional appeal derives from the fates of its protagonists. 7dfedd4038.text: „So kam es, dass der Schriftsetzer mit dem ruinierten Nervenkostüm dem allerletzten Vers des allerletzten Kapitels der schwedischen Bibel noch etwas hinzufügte, bevor das Ganze in Druck ging.“
7dfedd4038.translation: Thus, the typesetter, with his ruined nerve constitution, added something to the very last verse of the very last chapter of the Swedish Bible before the whole went to print.
7dfedd4038.text_linked: „So [[kam|verbs/kommen#5]] [[es|pronouns/es]], [[dass|conjunctions/dass]] [[der|pronouns/der_nominativ]] Schriftsetzer [[mit|prepositions/mit]] [[dem|determiners/der]] [[ruinierten|adjectives/ruiniert#1]] Nervenkostüm dem allerletzten [[Vers|nouns/Vers#1]] [[des|determiners/der]] allerletzten Kapitels der [[schwedischen|adjectives/schwedisch#1]] [[Bibel|nouns/Bibel#1]] [[noch|adverbs/noch#1]] [[etwas|pronouns/etwas#1]] [[hinzufügte|verbs/hinzufügen]], [[bevor|conjunctions/bevor]] [[das|pronouns/das_[1]]] Ganze [[in|prepositions/in]] [[Druck|nouns/Druck_reproduktionsverfahren#1]] [[ging|verbs/gehen#4]].“

7dfff58162.text: Ich glaube mein Nachbar hat Geld wie Heu, heute hat er sich wieder einen neuen Sportwagen gekauft.
7dfff58162.translation: I believe my neighbor has as much money as hay; today he bought himself a new sports car again.
